name: Cooking Layout
paraphrase: Arrange the stove, sink and main worktop in an uninterrupted U or L so that the cook can move between them in a few short steps, with continuous counter on either side of every appliance for setting things down. Alexander notes that cooking is a sequence of small actions whose flow is broken whenever the worktop is interrupted by a tall fridge, a doorway or a gap, so the working surfaces must form a single connected band around the cook.
